commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Now the sojourning of the children of Israel, who dwelt in Egypt, was four hundred and thirty years. Samaritan and Septuagint add, "and in the land of Chanaan, they and their fathers "dating from the departure of Abraham from Haran in his 75th year; from which period, till Jacob's going into Egypt, 215 years elapsed. Kennicott produces this instance, as a proof that the Hebrew text is defective: Dis. Josephus, ii. Augustine, q. and others, admit this addition as genuine; which, however we have observed on Genesis, is rejected by Ayrolus, Tournemine (Haydock).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
